values.name: Ownership Mindset
values.description: We take end-to-end responsibility for our work. We don't say 'that's not my job' — we see problems through to resolution and proactively identify what needs doing.
signals: Proposes solutions rather than just raising problems

values.name: Intellectual Curiosity
values.description: We ask 'why' and dig deeper. We value learning, experimentation, and the humility to admit when we don't know something.

values.name: Transparent Communication
values.description: We communicate openly, directly, and respectfully. We share context generously and give feedback that helps people grow.

values.name: Collaborative Excellence
values.description: We believe the best work happens when diverse perspectives come together. We actively seek input, share credit, and lift each other up.

values.name: Impact Over Activity
values.description: We measure ourselves by outcomes, not hours worked or lines of code written. We focus on the highest-leverage work and are willing to kill our darlings.
signals: Willing to change direction based on data

values.name: Bias for Action
values.description: We move quickly and learn by doing. We prefer reversible decisions made at 70% confidence over perfect decisions made too late.
